item.description:
What's new in Sonault 1.3.0

  • A complete purple vault redesign refreshes the library, popups, window chrome, sound details, and editing experience.
  • Double-click any sound card to open its details. Hover over the waveform to play instantly, then click while playing to seek.
  • Select sounds and press Delete to remove them, with clearer highlighting and actions for multi-selection.
  • A more compact 1200 × 770 default window keeps the library focused while remaining fully resizable.
